title: thelypteris supina
intro: Thelypteris supina, also known as the Least Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to North America and is characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris supina include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reduced inflammation, improved respiratory health, and enhanced immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies.
